Section Title: ... > ### About ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth
Content:
ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 12 Oct 1993. Sharmila D'Silva is the Current Fund Manager of ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹11,24,266 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 02 Apr 2026 is ₹31.06.
The ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
;
Section Title: ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth > ... > Investment Objective
Content:
The scheme seeks to invests in the units/shares of First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund. The Scheme may also invest a certain portion of its corpus in domestic debt or money market securities and/or debt mutual fund schemes/liquid schemes of domestic mutual funds including that of ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund, in order to meet liquidity requirements from time to time.;
Fund benchmark --
[Scheme Information Document(SID)](https://www.icicipruamc.com)

FAQ for ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF - Direct Plan
How to Invest in ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF - Direct Plan? Subscribers of Value Research Fund Advisor can conveniently invest in the low-cost direct plan of ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF - Direct Plan through the Value Research Fund Advisor website. Alternatively, mutual funds can also be purchased directly from the respective fund house’s website. For example, ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF - Direct Plan can be bought from the ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund website.
In such a case, if you are investing in multiple funds from different fund houses, you will need to transact separately on each fund house’s website. The third option is to invest offline, by seeking assistance from a mutual fund distributor. Most banks also act as mutual fund distributors, and you can approach your bank for help in completing your investment. Section Title: ... > About ICICI Prudential StrateGIC Metal And Energy Equity Fof - Growth
Content:
ICICI Prudential StrateGIC Metal And Energy Equity Fof - Growth is one Equity mutual fund offered by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. Launched on 02 Feb 2022, the fund aims Long term wealth creation solution. An Open ended fund of fund scheme investing in Units/shares of First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund. It manages assets worth ₹94.7 crore as on Thu Jul 31, 2025. The expense ratio stands at 1.58%.
The portfolio allocation consists of 96.94% in equities, 3.06% in other assets or cash equivalents. Managed by Sharmila D'Silva, it has delivered a return of 77.82% in the last year, a total return since inception of 29.16%.
Choosing the right [best sip to invest](https://www.policybazaar.com/sip/best-sip-plans/) has an important part for financial planning.

ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Fund (the Scheme) is an open-ended fund of fund scheme that invests in the units/shares of First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund.
The Scheme may also invest a certain portion of its corpus in domestic debt or money market securities and/or debt mutual fund schemes/liquid schemes of domestic mutual funds including that of ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund, in order to meet liquidity requirements from time to time.
